source.title: Do I need a wallet to play Holosim?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Do I need a wallet to play Holosim?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
No, you do not need a crypto wallet to start playing Holosim. The game is designed to be free-to-play and accessible directly from your browser.
When you create your character, the game automatically generates a background account for you. This account lets you save progress, form fleets, complete quests, and explore without needing to connect a wallet.

claims.text: No, you do not need a crypto wallet to start playing Holosim.
